python.notes: Python is allowed only for client SDK product code and artifacts.

shell.notes: Repository automation shell scripts are not allowed.

directory_purpose.tutorials: Tutorial artifacts and tutorial-facing static assets. Automation executes via bijux-dev-atlas commands.
directory_purpose.clients: Legacy path retired. Client SDK products live under crates/. Repo automation executes via bijux-dev-atlas commands.
directory_purpose.crates/bijux-atlas-python: Python client package product containing SDK source, docs, examples, tests, and notebooks.
